assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeIntegration writes audit log and returns auditLogEntry path on successful merge
assertionResults.title: writes audit log and returns auditLogEntry path on successful merge

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeIntegration still writes audit log when merge has no commits (empty branch)
assertionResults.title: still writes audit log when merge has no commits (empty branch)

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeIntegration returns auditLogEntry = null when the audit dir cannot be written
assertionResults.title: returns auditLogEntry = null when the audit dir cannot be written

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeIntegration integration result extends WorktreeMergeResult with auditLogEntry
assertionResults.title: integration result extends WorktreeMergeResult with auditLogEntry

assertionResults.fullName: getDefaultBranch (project-agnostic resolution) reads .cleo/config.json::git.defaultBranch when present
assertionResults.title: reads .cleo/config.json::git.defaultBranch when present

assertionResults.fullName: getDefaultBranch (project-agnostic resolution) falls back to local branch probing when no config + no remote
assertionResults.title: falls back to local branch probing when no config + no remote

assertionResults.fullName: getDefaultBranch (project-agnostic resolution) does not hardcode main — discovers `master` repos correctly
assertionResults.title: does not hardcode main — discovers `master` repos correctly

assertionResults.fullName: getDefaultBranch (project-agnostic resolution) returns "main" as last-resort fallback when nothing matches
assertionResults.title: returns "main" as last-resort fallback when nothing matches

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeViaMerge (ADR-062) preserves agent commit SHAs in target branch history (provenance contract)
assertionResults.title: preserves agent commit SHAs in target branch history (provenance contract)

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeViaMerge (ADR-062) does not hardcode `main` — works against an arbitrary target branch
assertionResults.title: does not hardcode `main` — works against an arbitrary target branch

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeViaMerge (ADR-062) returns merged: true with empty mergeCommit when no commits ahead
assertionResults.title: returns merged: true with empty mergeCommit when no commits ahead

assertionResults.fullName: completeAgentWorktreeViaMerge (ADR-062) returns error when the task branch does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns error when the task branch does not exist

ancestorTitles: when worktree directory does not exist
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree directory does not exist returns status=skipped and skips rmSync
assertionResults.title: returns status=skipped and skips rmSync

ancestorTitles: when worktree directory does not exist
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree directory does not exist still deletes a stale branch when the directory is already gone
assertionResults.title: still deletes a stale branch when the directory is already gone

ancestorTitles: when worktree directory does not exist
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree directory does not exist marks branchDeleted=true even when there is no branch to delete
assertionResults.title: marks branchDeleted=true even when there is no branch to delete

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean returns status=pruned after successful removal
assertionResults.title: returns status=pruned after successful removal

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean deletes the branch when it has 0 commits ahead of HEAD
assertionResults.title: deletes the branch when it has 0 commits ahead of HEAD

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean leaves the branch when it has commits ahead of HEAD
assertionResults.title: leaves the branch when it has commits ahead of HEAD

ancestorTitles: when worktree exists and is clean
assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree exists and is clean falls back to rmSync when git worktree remove fails
assertionResults.title: falls back to rmSync when git worktree remove fails

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree is dirty marks wasDirty=true
assertionResults.title: marks wasDirty=true

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree is dirty writes an audit log entry when dirty
assertionResults.title: writes an audit log entry when dirty

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree when worktree is dirty does NOT write an audit log entry when clean
assertionResults.title: does NOT write an audit log entry when clean

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree error handling returns status=error when the directory is not a git repo
assertionResults.title: returns status=error when the directory is not a git repo

assertionResults.fullName: pruneWorktree error handling returns status=error when both git remove and rmSync fail
assertionResults.title: returns status=error when both git remove and rmSync fail
